title: New #1 open-source AI model is here!
summary: AI Search reviews GLM 5.2, described as a top-performing open-source AI model. The video demonstrates its capabilities across multiple domains including 3D modeling, animation with voiceover, ray tracing, music composition, and mathematical visualization. GLM 5.2 can be integrated into Claude and accessed via Z.ai's chat and coding platforms.
writeup: AI Search reviews GLM 5.2, an open-source model positioned as a top performer among open releases. The demonstrations span 3D modeling, animation with voiceover, ray tracing, music composition, and mathematical visualization, showing the model's range across generative and code-driven tasks. The video notes practical access points: GLM 5.2 can be integrated into Claude and used through Z.ai's chat and coding platforms.
